2025 Rising Stars
The 2025 Rising Stars in Data Science workshop was hosted by Stanford University. In collaboration with the University of California, San Diego, and the University of Chicago, thirty Rising Stars were selected to participate in the 2025 Rising Stars workshop. See more information on the 2025 cohort on the [Stanford Data Science](https://datascience.stanford.edu/programs/rising-stars-data-science/2025-rising-stars-cohort) website.
The Rising Stars in Data Science workshop focuses on celebrating and fast tracking the careers of exceptional data scientists at a critical inflection point in their career: the transition to postdoctoral scholar, research scientist, industry research position, or tenure track position. Over the past five years, the Rising Stars workshop has hosted over 130 Rising Stars from nearly 40 institutions.
Click [here](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/research/postdoctoral-programs/rising-stars) for information on the 2026 cohort, hosted at the University of Chicago.

# 2025 Rising Stars
The 2025 Rising Stars in Data Science workshop was hosted by Stanford University. In collaboration with the University of California, San Diego, and the University of Chicago, thirty Rising Stars were selected to participate in the 2025 Rising Stars workshop. See more information on the 2025 cohort on the [Stanford Data Science](https://datascience.stanford.edu/programs/rising-stars-data-science/2025-rising-stars-cohort) website.
The Rising Stars in Data Science workshop focuses on celebrating and fast tracking the careers of exceptional data scientists at a critical inflection point in their career: the transition to postdoctoral scholar, research scientist, industry research position, or tenure track position. Over the past five years, the Rising Stars workshop has hosted over 130 Rising Stars from nearly 40 institutions.
Click [here](https://datascience.uchicago.edu/research/postdoctoral-programs/rising-stars) for information on the 2026 cohort, hosted at the University of Chicago.
